best_prompt: Use a structured approach: list each person and the objects they start with, then update the list after each exchange. After all swaps are completed, cross-reference the final positions with the answer choices and select the correct one. Output only the letter of your answer, such as (A).

features.name: explicit_initial_state
features.description: Measures whether the prompt explicitly instructs the AI to list each person and the objects they start with before processing exchanges. 1 indicates the presence of such a directive, 0 indicates the absence. This feature causally affects performance because specifying the initial state provides a clear starting point for tracking, reducing ambiguity in object movements and improving accuracy in final position determination.

features.name: final_choice_verification
features.description: Measures whether the prompt explicitly instructs the AI to cross-reference or verify the final positions with the answer choices before selecting the correct one. 1 indicates the presence of such a directive, 0 indicates the absence. This feature causally affects performance because an explicit final check ensures accuracy in matching the tracked positions to the correct answer, reducing selection errors.

features.name: step_by_step_instruction
features.description: Measures whether the prompt explicitly instructs the AI to process exchanges in a step-by-step manner, updating object locations after each swap. 1 indicates the presence of such instructions, 0 indicates the absence. This feature causally affects performance because step-by-step processing ensures systematic tracking of object movements, reducing errors in final position determination.
